description.value: Price 6,500 gp; Slot shoulders; CL 3rd; Weight 2 lbs.; Aura faint enchantment EFFECTS While wearing this stole, the wearer gains a +2 competence bonus on Diplomacy checks to improve someoneâs attitude and on wild empathy checks to improve an animalâs attitude. Three times per day on command, the wearer can activate the stole to gain a 20-foot radius aura of either calm animals or calm emotions for 1 minute ( Will DC 13 negates). The stole also functions as cold weather clothing. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 3,000 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells calm animals, calm emotions
